example-1.license: Your payroll provider partners with Gusto Inc. for payments processing. Gusto Inc. is a licensed money transmitter. Learn more on our license page.

contractor_payment_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the contractor payment receipt.

company_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the company making the contractor payment.

name_of_sender.description: The name of the company making the contractor payment.

name_of_recipient.description: The individual or company name of the contractor receiving payment.

debit_date.description: The debit date for the contractor payment.

license.description: Always the fixed string "Your payroll provider partners with Gusto Inc. for payments processing. Gusto Inc. is a licensed money transmitter. Learn more on our license page."

license_uri.description: URL for the license information for the licensed payroll processor. Always the fixed string "https://gusto.com/about/licenses"

right_to_refund.description: URL for information related to right to refund. Always the fixed string "https://gusto.com/about/licenses"

liability_of_licensee.description: URL for information related to right to liability of licensee. Always the fixed string "https://gusto.com/about/licenses"

totals.description: The subtotals for the contractor payment.

company_debit.description: The total company debit for the contractor payment.

contractor_payments.description: An array of contractor payments for this contractor payment.

contractor_first_name.description: The first name of the contractor. Applies when `contractor_type` is `Individual`.

contractor_last_name.description: The last name of the contractor.  Applies when `contractor_type` is `Individual`.

contractor_business_name.description: The business name of the contractor. Applies when `contractor_type` is `Business`.

wage.description: The fixed wage of the payment, regardless of hours worked.

bonus.description: The bonus amount in the payment.

reimbursement.description: The reimbursement amount in the payment.

name.description: Always the fixed string "Gusto, Zenpayroll Inc."

value.license: Your payroll provider partners with Gusto Inc. for payments processing. Gusto Inc. is a licensed money transmitter. Learn more on our license page.

404.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.
